name: KEWAUNEE SCIENTIFIC CORP /DE/
business: The company designs, manufactures, and installs laboratory, healthcare, and technical furniture and infrastructure products. Its products include steel and wood casework, fume hoods, biological safety cabinets, and epoxy resin work surfaces. The company also provides facility design, engineering, and project management services internationally.

exposures.sentence: Products are sold principally to pharmaceutical, biotechnology, industrial, chemical and commercial research laboratories, educational institutions, healthcare institutions, governmental entities, and manufacturing facilities.
